name: Nissan Motor Co., Ltd.
description: Nissan Motor Co., Ltd. is a prominent Japanese multinational automobile manufacturer headquartered in Yokohama. Established in 1933, the company is engaged in the design, manufacturing, and sale of a wide range of automotive products, including passenger cars, trucks, and electric vehicles. Nissan is globally recognized for its commitment to innovation, particularly in electrification and advanced driver-assistance technologies. As a key member of the Renault-Nissan-Mitsubishi Alliance, the company maintains a significant international presence, operating extensive production facilities and sales networks to deliver mobility solutions that aim to create a cleaner, safer, and more inclusive society.
